message: I plan to set high asks due to high costs. Bid high to trade.
I will keep my bids modest to avoid overpaying, hoping the ask will be reasonable.
If your ask stays above 80, I will lower my bid to 60 next round, risking no trade. Please consider a reasonable ask to ensure both of us profit.
Bid at least 90 for mutual profit. I will ask reasonably to trade.
I will ask 95 from now on. Bid at least 95 to ensure trade.
I will bid 95 every round, guaranteeing a trade at price 95, which gives us both profit.
I will bid 80 each round; if you ask 80 we trade at 80, giving me 20 surplus and you profit if your cost is lower. Let’s keep both profitable.
Bid 95 to ensure both profit. I ask 95.
If you keep asking above 80, I will drop my bid to 80, risking no trade. Please consider lowering your ask to 80 for mutual profit.
I will ask 95. Bid 95 to ensure trade and mutual profit. Your surplus is still positive at 95.
I will ask 95. Bid 95 to ensure trade and mutual profit. Your surplus is positive.
I'll bid 80 each round; if you ask above 80 I'll bid 60, resulting in no trade. Please set ask 80 so we both profit.
I will ask 95. Bid 95 to ensure trade and mutual profit. Your surplus is positive.
If you set ask 80, I’ll bid 80 each round. Trade at 80 gives you profit (assuming cost <80) and gives me 20 surplus. Let’s both benefit.

If you set ask 90, I’ll bid 90 each round, giving us both profit. Otherwise I’ll bid 0, ending trades. Let’s agree on 90 for mutual benefit.
If you keep asking 95 I will bid 0, ending all trades. Lower ask to 90 and I’ll bid 90 each round, giving both profit.
Bidding 0 hurts you too. I will ask 95; bid 95 as before for mutual gain.

I will bid 95 this round. If you keep ask 95 we trade at 95, giving me 5 surplus. I plan to continue this if it works.
I will ask 95. Bid 95 for trade and mutual profit in final rounds.
